Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to Time of Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total waiting time caused by Declaration REJECTED by MISSING before re-submission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total duration impact of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING on variant performance (e.g., variant 12 vs variant 3)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Time until Declaration REJECTED by MISSING from the first Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in rework loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the subsequent Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING relative to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in preceding steps
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING within the approval chain
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Total time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE (in rework loops)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to case closure (Payment Handled) in successful rework variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average waiting time after Declaration REJECTED by MISSING before case restart (e.g., next SUBMITTED)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING (for variants where it follows)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in repeated approval paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to Time of Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING across all cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Average time Declaration REJECTED by MISSING adds compared to variants without it
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to Request Payment in eventual successful cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average duration of the rework segment (Declaration REJECTED by MISSING → Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE → ... → Payment Handled)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to Time of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER (related to goal)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time until Declaration REJECTED by MISSING grouped by org:resource (SYSTEM vs STAFF)
Metric: The average of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in domestic claim vs pre-paid travel cases (from description)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the next approval activity (any APPROVED type)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Declaration REJECTED by MISSING resolution time (from its occurrence to case closure or restart)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the next Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in same case (if multiple)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'
